name: Aura Energy Limited
content: Aura Energy Limited is an Australian-based minerals company focused on the development of the Tiris Uranium Project in Mauritania and the Häggån Vanadium Project in Sweden. The company is transitioning from an explorer to a producer, with its flagship Tiris Project being a low-capital, low-operating-cost development located in a major emerging uranium province. Aura Energy aims to provide sustainable energy solutions through the responsible extraction of uranium and vanadium, positioning itself as a key player in the global transition toward carbon-free nuclear power and energy storage.
